Movie.title: Movie
Movie.description: A movie or video entry in the streaming platform.

description.description: A brief summary of the movie.

thumbnail.description: URL to the movie's thumbnail image.

video_url.description: URL to the movie's video file.

year.description: The release year of the movie.

rating.description: The age rating of the movie.

views.description: The number of views the movie has received.

is_user_uploaded.description: Whether the movie was uploaded by a user.

uploader_id.description: The ID of the user who uploaded the movie.

uploader_name.description: The name of the user who uploaded the movie.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the movie was added.

/movies/{movieId}.description: Collection of movies available on the platform.
